name: Fighter
description: Tough and well-armed. Starts with a sword, sturdy health, and healing.

name: Hunter
description: Strikes from afar. Begins with a Short Bow and a healing potion.

name: Acolyte
description: Frail but resourceful, carrying scrolls and curing draughts.

name: Wanderer
description: A jack-of-all-trades with a mixed pack and balanced health.
